assertions.title: Generic associated constructors preserve inferred concrete type arguments

steps.expected: Positive semantic regressions cover inferred generic associated constructors outside impl contexts.
steps.observed: Located fixtures at test/test_typecheck.ml:826, :866, :885, and :904 with registrations at :967, :971, :974, and :977.

steps.action: Run `nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe -- test --color=never positive 31,33-35`
steps.expected: The focused positive regressions for generic constructor inference all pass through the real typecheck CLI surface.
steps.observed: Exit code 0. Cases 31, 33, 34, and 35 reported `[OK]` and Alcotest ended with `Test Successful in 0.001s. 4 tests run.`

commands.command: nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe -- test --color=never positive 31,33-35

assertions.title: Pointer-receiver methods work on non-addressable call sites

steps.action: Inspect pointer-receiver regression coverage in test/test_codegen.ml
steps.expected: A codegen regression exercises a pointer receiver call on a non-addressable expression and checks runtime behavior.
steps.observed: Located `test_pointer_receiver_non_addressable` at test/test_codegen.ml:752 with registration at :1479; the fixture calls `Counter::new(42).get()`, expects output `42\n`, and asserts the generated Go contains `(self *Counter)`.

steps.action: Run `nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_codegen.exe -- test --color=never pointer-receiver 0`
steps.expected: The focused codegen regression builds and runs successfully through the real generated-Go flow.
steps.observed: Exit code 0. `pointer-receiver 0 non-addressable receiver` reported `[OK]` and Alcotest ended with `Test Successful in 0.212s. 1 test run.`

commands.command: nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_codegen.exe -- test --color=never pointer-receiver 0

assertions.title: Go version requirements are surfaced for trait-enabled output

steps.action: Inspect Go-version validation coverage in test/test_codegen.ml
steps.expected: Coverage includes both adequate-environment and clear failure/simulation paths for unsupported or unparseable Go versions.
steps.observed: Located tests at test/test_codegen.ml:1192, :1202, :1213, :1223, and :1230 with registrations at :1524, :1526, :1528, :1530, and :1532.

steps.action: Run `nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_codegen.exe -- test --color=never go-version 0-4`
steps.expected: The validation surface confirms acceptable Go versions and surfaces clear errors for below-minimum or unparseable versions.
steps.observed: Exit code 0. Cases 0-4 all reported `[OK]`; the Nix shell reported `go:    go1.26.1`, and Alcotest ended with `Test Successful in 0.004s. 5 tests run.`

commands.command: nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_codegen.exe -- test --color=never go-version 0-4

summary: Retested 3 assigned CLI/generated-Go assertions. VAL-SEM-019, VAL-CODEGEN-015, and VAL-CROSS-007 all passed with focused Nix-based Alcotest runs and fresh terminal log evidence.
